revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24755395338|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Ihano Shrine (Co-Enshrinement)
| native_name = 石大神（椿大神社に合祀）
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Ihano Shrine (Co-Enshrinement)
| coordinates = {{coord|34.953649|136.433806}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Ihano Shrine (Co-Enshrinement)'''|石大神（椿大神社に合祀）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ise Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Subshrine|lt=Shikinai Subshrine|qid=Q135100459|1=Shikinai Subshrine}}
* {{ill|Q11412524|ltq=Q11412524|qid=Q11412524|1=Co-Enshrinement}}
* {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11378973|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province}}
** P155: {{ill|Q135039368|ltq=Q135039368|qid=Q135039368|1=Fukeno Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Nakaseno Shrine|lt=Nakaseno Shrine|qid=Q135039370|1=Nakaseno Shrine (Q135039370)}}
* {{ill|Q3541617|ltq=Q3541617|qid=Q3541617|1=Tsubaki Grand Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Q864166|ltq=Q864166|qid=Q864166|1=Ise Province}}
* {{ill|Suzuka District, Mie|lt=Suzuka district|de|Suzuka-gun|en|Suzuka District, Mie|ja|鈴鹿郡|zh|鈴鹿郡|qid=Q278828|1=Suzuka District, Mie}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {{coord|34.953649|136.433806}}

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 181263
** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}}
